_comment: v11: the corpus-expansion experiment that v10 was supposed to run. Same v9/v10 architecture (proven). Combines two committed conversational corpora: dailydialog_clean.txt (3.6 MB, DailyDialog cleaned) + everyday_conversations.txt (1.7 MB, HuggingFaceTB/everyday-conversations-llama3.1-2k cleaned). Both are now in HEAD on origin/main, so Modal's repo clone will see them. EPOCHS=5 (corpus is 5.3 MB total — 50% bigger than v9's 3.6 MB, still fits 5h L4 timeout). NGRAM_TABLE_SIZE bumped to 100003 because combined vocab will exceed v9's 9509 (estimated 10-12k after rare-merge). smol-smoltalk dropped from this run — inspection showed it is instruction-tuning data with system prompts and code generation, wrong distribution for conversational coherence.
